zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers於1234年出生在法國布爾波乃斯時，她的父親Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX30歲，母親Yolande de CHATILLON16歲。她於1248年1月26日與Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世於1262年在她的家鄉享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers于1234年出生在法国布爾波乃斯时，她的父亲Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX30岁，母亲Yolande de CHATILLON16岁。她于1248年1月26日与Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也布爾波-利阿哈波奧爾特结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。她去世于1262年在她的家乡享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nevers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from the city of Nevers in France.
Possibly an altered form of English Nevard or perhaps of its extinct variant Neverd. The surname Nevers is also found in Jamaica.

History: The majority of the American bearers of this surname trace their origin to Richard Nevers, born in 1666 in Woburn, MA. His origin is not known, but his surname is also documented in the forms Nevard and Neverds, which make it possible that Richard Nevers was of English origin.

variants.name: Nevard
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Nevard, from ancient Germanic Niwhard, from niw- ‘new’ + hard- ‘strong, hardy’. Compare Nevers .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers was born in 1234, in Bourbonnais, France, her father, Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX, was 30 and her mother, Yolande de CHATILLON, was 16. She married Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers on 26 January 1248, in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died in 1262, in her hometown, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers est née en 1234, à Bourbonnais, France, son père, Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Yolande de CHATILLON, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers le 26 janvier 1248, à Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1262, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers 1234 in Bourbonnais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX 30 und ihre Mutter Yolande de CHATILLON 16. Sie hat am 26. Januar 1248 in Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1262 im Alter von 28 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers è nata il nel 1234 nel Bourbonnais, Francia, sua padre, Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Yolande de CHATILLON, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers il 26 gennaio 1248, nel Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì nel 1262, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Neversが1234年にフランスボウルボナイスで生まれた時，父Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IXは30歳，母Yolande de CHATILLONは16歳であった。1248年1月26日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールボウルボン-ル'アルチャンバウルトでOdo of Burgundy Count of Neversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1262年に故郷で28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers(이)가 1234년 프랑스 부르보나이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Yolande de CHATILLON(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1248년 1월 26일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 부르보-'아르챔바트에서 Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1262년 그녀의 고향에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers nasceu em 1234, em Bourbonnais, França, seu pai, Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de CHATILLON, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers em 26 de janeiro de 1248, em Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1262, em sua cidade natal, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers родилась в 1234 г. в местности бурбоннеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Yolande de CHATILLON, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers 26 января 1248 г. в местности бурбон-л'арчамбаулт, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1262 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda de Nevers II,  Countess of Nevers nació en 1234, en Bourbonnais, Francia, su papá, Archambaud de DAMPIERRE IX, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Yolande de CHATILLON, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Odo of Burgundy Count of Nevers el 26 de enero de 1248, en Bourbon-l'Archambault, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió en 1262, en su pueblo, a la edad de 28 años.
